ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* ID of the college the player attended */,
  "exp" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the player */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "agent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the draft took place */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the draft */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the draft */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the draft */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the draft took place */,
  "number_of_picks" INTEGER /* Total number of picks in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pick */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft the pick belongs to */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the pick */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scout who recommended the player */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the pick */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_picks_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_picks" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pick associated with the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "pick_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the college */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, scout, coach) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks_history" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pick */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft the pick belongs to */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the pick */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that made the pick */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player selected */,
  "pick_date" TEXT /* Date the pick was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_history_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_history_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the player */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions by the player */,
  "rushing_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts by the player */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Number of passing yards by the player */,
  "passing_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns by the player */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown by the player */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles by the player */,
  "fumbles_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles recovered by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player */,
  "punting_yards" INTEGER /* Number of punting yards by the player */,
  "kickoff_return_yards" INTEGER /* Number of kickoff return yards by the player */,
  "punt_return_yards" INTEGER /* Number of punt return yards by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
